title: schedonorus arundinaceus subsp. orientalis
intro: Schedonorus arundinaceus subsp. orientalis, also known as the Japanese timothy grass or Oriental timothy grass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a type of perennial grass that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Schedonorus arundinaceus subsp. orientalis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Traditionally, this plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction to make a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional.
